title: CPR can save life | Cardiologist explains what everyone must know | Health Wrap | EP: 25
description:
In Episode 25 of Health Wrap by The Hindu, senior health journalist Ramya Kannan speaks with Dr. Preetam Krishnamurthy, Consultant Interventional Cardiologist, P & G Hospital, Chennai, about the fundamentals of first aid and the importance of CPR in emergencies.

The conversation explores who can perform CPR, what immediate steps should be taken during a medical emergency, and why early intervention can significantly improve survival outcomes.

Tune in to understand how basic life-saving knowledge can make a critical difference.

description: Global airlines face their worst financial crisis since COVID-19 due to the Iran conflict, wiping over $50 billion off major carriers' market value. Soaring jet fuel prices, now double, threaten ticket price hikes and potential shortages. Executives warn of dampened demand from sustained high fares, while Middle Eastern airlines are hit particularly hard by airspace closures and tourism collapse.

description: A chilling discovery in Kochi: five family members, including three young children, were found dead in their rented home. Police suspect the children were poisoned before the women died by suicide, with a suicide note pointing to severe family tensions following the husband's death. The family had recently moved to Kochi for a child's treatment.

description: Sharjeel Imam, an accused in the "larger conspiracy" case related to the Delhi riots of 2020, reached his ancestral village Kako after six years to attend his younger brother Muzzammil Imam's wedding and spend time with his ailing mother. The Imam arrived here following a 10-day interim bail by a Delhi Court.

description: As Middle East tensions rise, Iran's hidden underwater threats, particularly its Ghadir-class midget submarines and extensive naval mine stockpiles, pose a significant challenge to global shipping. These stealthy assets, capable of operating in shallow waters and laying mines, can disrupt vital oil transit routes like the Strait of Hormuz, impacting global trade far more effectively than visible attacks.

description: SpaceX has formally responded to Amazon's FCC petition against its satellite data center proposal. SpaceX argues that if Amazon's criticisms are applied, they must also be applied to Blue Origin's similar satellite data center application. SpaceX is pushing for equitable treatment and consistent review of both companies' plans.

title: Why Kerala's 'semi-final' verdict has put Left on red alert
description: Local body poll results in Kerala signal a potential shift, with the Congress-led UDF gaining momentum against the ruling LDF. The UDF secured key urban strongholds, raising concerns about anti-incumbency for Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan's government. The BJP also shows strategic expansion, hinting at a more competitive assembly election.
